entry.title: Sunlight
entry.summary:
Author: maryofmossandmoonmilk

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 37,194Chapters: 19/?Kudos: 178

Summary: In a world in which Arthur told Merlin to leave and never come back after finding out about his magic.A year later Merlin is back and ready to defend Camelot with his magic.....but he's not the same Merlin.

entry.title: Take My Life (And Hold It Tight)
entry.summary:
Author: DollopheadedMerlin

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,421Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 35

Summary: After Gaius dies at the hands of Agravaine in the events of The Secret Sharer, Merlin reveals his magic to Arthur as a last ditch effort to see if Destiny was truly on his side.What follows is a terrible series of revelations, dubious rituals, offensive job offers, and lots of not-quite secrets still to be revealed. A season 4 & 5 rewrite where everything is worse.

entry.title: Thirty Days of Light
entry.summary:
Author: loser_boy08

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,566Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: Thirty days. Thirty stories. One month of becoming. At Camelot University, June arrives with rainbow banners, late-night conversations, bad coffee, and the slow, sometimes messy work of figuring out who you are and who you want to be. Merlin is learning how to say things out loud. Gwen has receipts. Arthur is not who Merlin thought he was. Elyan has a name that fits. Freya finds a word that finally makes sense. And somewhere between first dates, almost-confessions, and found family filling up too-small rooms, everything begins to shift. A Pride Month collection of interconnected moments — hopeful, romantic, messy, and real.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The Letter
entry.summary:
Author: loser_boy08

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 614Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: One year later, Merlin writes a letter to the person he used to be — about fear, about finding himself, and about everything that came after. Or: a story about coming out, found family, and the quiet, hard-earned joy of becoming.

entry.title: Masquerade Ball
entry.summary:
Author: Merlin_In_The_Tavern

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,957Chapters: 1/4Kudos: 3

Summary: Attending a secret sex party at Lord Godwin's invitation, Arthur finds his own servant, Merlin, among the masks—even though he specifically told him not to come. In this sinful night where identities are hidden, Arthur seizes his first and last chance to claim the servant he has desired for years. Disguising his voice with selfish hunger, he whispers to Merlin: "Will you sleep with me?"

entry.title: A straight approach to being queer
entry.summary:
Author: SueRose

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 161,580Chapters: 41/?Kudos: 158

Summary: Rich nepo boy Arthur Pendragon joins his university's queer club. And pretends to be queer, because he needs to write a paper about queer representation. But.... He has not expected this. This being the leader of the club, namely Merlins Emrys, who does not believe a word he says. Will he be able to appear queer enough to his new peers? Or will all of this end up in a giant disaster?

entry.title: You were the one to teach me how to use knives: Vol 5
entry.summary:
Author: Obsessedwithfanfiction

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 26,705Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 79

Summary: Morgana's memory curse is still in place, but Leon's no longer the only person suspicious of her. Gwen's got a mystery to solve and a long-lost brother to deal with. Morgana's determined to get closer to Merlin again to try and find out how long he's been hiding his magic from her. Meanwhile Merlin's just flattered to be receiving a Lady's attention, though with Gwaine coming back into his life, that might not be the only attention he's receiving. And Arthur's struggling his way back through his character growth and what kind of King he wants to be...

  • don't quote me though
  • No beta we die like Uther should have done seasons before he did
  • did ya miss me
  • I am going to try and update every 3 weeks ish on a Friday but it will be dependent on internet connection

entry.title: if you are justice, please do not lie
entry.summary:
Author: daseydaisy

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 45,536Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 55

Summary: “Can I help you?” The man shoved past him, not even the slightest bit put off by the biosteel onesie in red and gold. He unlocked the purple door with a wave of his hand (that’s not right, Arthur’s brain insisted) and shoved it open. “Sorry, I just…” All the words he wanted to say died somewhere between his brain and his mouth. Everything felt wrong but his heart eased up for the first time since he woke up in the middle of what he assumed was a park with a head injury and no memories. He pulled in a deep breath, set his shoulders, and tried again. “I think I belong to you.” There was a tense moment where neither man breathed. Or Superhero Arthur gets amnesia and decides to crash on Merlin's couch while Merlin's doing his best to "save" the city.

entry.title: The Sundered Soul
entry.summary:
Author: DarkWhimsy

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 191,214Chapters: 20/20Kudos: 536

Summary: When a sparring accident nearly kills Arthur, Merlin reacts without thinking - and exposes his magic before the entire training yard. But the fallout is interrupted by a sorcerer’s attack that rips Merlin’s soul from his body, leaving behind only Emrys: magic incarnate, stripped of warmth and memory. As Camelot reels, Arthur must face not just the politics of magic and the prophecy surrounding him, but his own feelings for the servant who has always stood by his side. Magic has always come at a cost - but Arthur never imagined the price would be Merlin himself.

entry.title: Scattered 'Cross My Family Line
entry.summary:
Author: starrysomewhere

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,612Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 15

Summary: Mordred had long accepted that his past with Merlin meant much more to him than it ever would Merlin. Of course their encounter when he was a boy was but a footnote in Merlin’s life, but it was something Mordred could never forget. Since coming to Camelot, he was simply happy to serve the King and stand by Merlin’s side... what Mordred hadn’t expected was the pure look of distrust he got from Merlin instead. When Mordred is injured protecting him, Merlin can no longer hide his true feelings about the druid boy.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Blind Loyalty
entry.summary:
Author: Shippeoforever

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,599Chapters: 10/10Kudos: 36

Summary: The laws of Camelot are clear: no animal that does not serve for hunting may cross the castle walls. But when the new King Arthur discovers that his closest advisor has defied the rules for a small, snow-white, blind puppy, the destiny of Albion takes an unexpected turn. Amidst secrets shared with the most loyal knights, Morgana's cunning, and the warmth of a love that defies royal decrees, a new law is about to be written... one dictated by the heart.   Note:** Story created with the help of AI, but all ideas are my own. Tags will be added as the story progresses. I should mention that English isn't my first language, so I apologize if there are any spelling mistakes throughout the fanfic. The chapters will be short, I'm warning you now, but that doesn't make it any less of an important story.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Your Love Warms My Bones
entry.summary:
Author: PageTurnerEm

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,159Chapters: 3/3Kudos: 12

Summary: Merlin has been waiting for Arthur's return for centuries. When Merlin agrees to attends a renaissance faire with his friend. Arthur comes back and wanders into the renaissance faire thinking that he is back home. They meet again, But will it be the same? Will they have to courage to say what they have wanted to for so long?

entry.title: i'm a winged insect (you're a funeral pyre)
entry.summary:
Author: ryn_writes

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,602Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 32

Summary: Merlin burns, and Arthur knows it is justified. Sorcerers must die: it is law. He will not feel regret, even as Morgana rages and Gaius grieves and the knights conspire to return Merlin's remains to Hunith.

entry.title: For Good
entry.summary:
Author: elevenincamelot

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 103,705Chapters: 20/?Kudos: 241

Summary: Fifteen hundred years. I’m sure it’s been fifteen hundred years because I’ve felt every single moment of it. Every draw of breath, every step on the hard ground, every ounce of stark reality has been obvious to me. I’m not the same as I was. Time has a way of digging deep into your spirit and settling its claws there. And I will wait. I have no choice, but I keep telling myself that wouldn’t matter. It might not matter. Would he even know me? Behind this familiar face is a creature who has lived the lives of hundreds of tortured souls. Does it show? Could he see the desperation there? If I made him look, really look...If he were here, I like to think I could be who I once was. Could feel the release of the claws of time like a weight coming off my chest. I like to think that weight would be erased. That I would be whole again. Have I only changed for the interim? Could that shroud be lifted for good?

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,593Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 42

The people around them know to never leave them alone together in a room, but one faithful day, they forget, and things escalate a bit, leading to Arthur having a revelation. -----Arthur: I've known Merlin for a decade, I know every little thing about himMorgana: Even that he has magic?Arthur: he has what now

entry.title: it's not my fire, but was forged in flame
entry.summary:
Author: elfesetamour

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 69,340Chapters: 26/27Kudos: 83

Summary: Unable to heal from Camelot’s greatest loss, Merlin is haunted by nightmares—or something more sinister—of Arthur. But, despite the undeniable resemblance, it’s impossible that the Arthur in his dreams is the same one he’d held in his arms as he died. Searching through the Mist, Merlin leaves his old life behind in search of a new destiny, which brings him to Paris, 1643. In a land of feuds and a time of revolution, among old faces as well as new, Merlin searches for meaning side by side with Arthur again. But whether he can come to terms with their differences, or accept his feelings for this new Arthur, all the while protecting him, may be a greater challenge than he signed up for. "That was Arthur, standing right in front of him. Yes, he wasn’t completely the same but that was him-no mistake. A scar visible on his cheek, and that beard covering his face couldn’t fool Merlin. He knew Arthur better than that. " Merlin’s magic takes him on a journey through time to Musketeer Era France, where he meets Arthur, the Captain of the King’s Red Guard. Ruthless, bloodthirsty, and emotionally closed off, Merlin seems unable to deny anything this new Arthur asks of him.
